name: codebase-scan
description: Brownfield codebase scanning and architecture onboarding for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Scan an existing codebase before making changes
interface.longDescription: A brownfield onboarding plugin for Codex that scans an existing codebase, identifies architecture and conventions, and highlights integration points, risks, and likely change surfaces before implementation starts.
defaultPrompt: Scan this codebase before we change it
Map the relevant architecture for this feature
Show me the likely integration points and risks
